stages.name: pure_normalize
stages.description: Full row-wise layer normalization without gamma/beta: tilize, mean, center, variance, rsqrt, normalize, untilize
stages.reference_body:
import torch.nn.functional as F
golden = F.layer_norm(x_torch, [x_torch.shape[-1]], eps=1e-5)

stages.name: gamma_scale
stages.description: Add gamma (scale) multiplication to normalization: read gamma RM, tilize gamma, apply mul<ROW> broadcast
stages.reference_body:
import torch.nn.functional as F
gamma_torch = torch.randn(1, 1, 1, x_torch.shape[-1])
gamma_ttnn = ttnn.from_torch(gamma_torch, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, layout=ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT, device=device, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG)
golden = F.layer_norm(x_torch, [x_torch.shape[-1]], weight=gamma_torch.squeeze(), eps=1e-5)
stages.extra_ttnn_setup: gamma_ttnn = ttnn.from_torch(gamma_torch, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, layout=ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT, device=device, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG)

stages.name: full_affine
stages.description: Add beta (shift) addition to normalization with gamma: read beta RM, tilize beta, apply add<ROW> broadcast
stages.reference_body:
import torch.nn.functional as F
gamma_torch = torch.randn(1, 1, 1, x_torch.shape[-1])
beta_torch = torch.randn(1, 1, 1, x_torch.shape[-1])
gamma_ttnn = ttnn.from_torch(gamma_torch, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, layout=ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT, device=device, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG)
beta_ttnn = ttnn.from_torch(beta_torch, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, layout=ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT, device=device, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG)
golden = F.layer_norm(x_torch, [x_torch.shape[-1]], weight=gamma_torch.squeeze(), bias=beta_torch.squeeze(), eps=1e-5)
stages.extra_setup:
gamma_torch = torch.randn(1, 1, 1, shape[-1])
beta_torch = torch.randn(1, 1, 1, shape[-1])
stages.extra_ttnn_setup:
gamma_ttnn = ttnn.from_torch(gamma_torch, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, layout=ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT, device=device, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG)
beta_ttnn = ttnn.from_torch(beta_torch, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, layout=ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT, device=device, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG)
